channel.title: NotchNest's Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.2.3 - Thanks for downloading NotchNest.
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest.

Here’s what’s new in Version 1.2.3:

  • Clipboard search field is now searchable on first click
  • Added camera source selection for Mirror
  • Default quote in Notes no longer reappears after deletion
  • Calendar toggle selections now persist after app restarts

    • As always, if you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out at 29satnam@gmail.com.

    ]]>

item.title: Version 1.2.4 - Thanks for downloading NotchNest. Here’s what’s new in Version 1.2.4:
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest. Here’s what’s new in Version 1.2.4:
  • Added support for YouTube Music.
  • Introduced the Frosted Black Notch Glass with interactive Liquid Glass effects.
  • Updated with a new Glass app icon.

    • As always, if you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out at 29satnam@gmail.com.

    ]]>

item.title: Version 1.2.2 - Thanks for downloading NotchNest.
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest.

Here’s what’s new in Version 1.2.2:

  • We fixed an issue we hope you never encountered.

    • Your support means a lot, and early feedback helps us improve faster.

    As always, if you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out at 29satnam@gmail.com.

    ]]>

item.title: Version 1.2.1 - Thanks for downloading NotchNest AI.
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest AI.

Here’s what’s new in Version 1.2.1:

  • On-Device AI is here. Introducing Daily Brief AI for Calendar, AI-powered Quick Notes, and the AI Clipboard Manager — rephrase, summarize, and refine your text.
  • Fixed Music app icon flickering.
  • Long track titles now scroll for better readability.

    • Your support means a lot, and early feedback helps us improve faster.

    As always, if you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out at 29satnam@gmail.com.

    ]]>

item.title: Version 1.1.7 - Thanks for downloading NotchNest.
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest.

Here’s what’s new in Version 1.1.7:

  • Resolved a critical exception that was causing the app to crash and terminate.

    • Your support means a lot, and early feedback helps us improve faster.

    As always, if you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out at 29satnam@gmail.com.

    ]]>

item.title: Version 1.1.6 - Thanks for downloading NotchNest.
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest.

Here’s what’s new in Version 1.1.6:

  • Resolved a critical exception that was causing the app to crash and terminate.

    • Your support means a lot, and early feedback helps us improve faster.

    As always, if you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out at 29satnam@gmail.com.

    ]]>

item.title: Version 1.1.5 - Thanks for downloading NotchNest.
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest.

Here’s what’s new in Version 1.1.5:

  • Closed notch can now be resized to align with the physical notch.
  • Fixed an issue where the closed notch size was incorrect after sleep/wake.
  • Added smooth spring animations for a more natural, system-like open/close experience.
  • Resolved several crashes (hopefully ones you never ran into).

    • Your support means a lot, and early feedback helps us improve faster.

    As always, if you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out at 29satnam@gmail.com.

    ]]>

item.title: Version 1.1.4 - Thanks for downloading NotchNest.
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest.

Here’s what’s new in Version 1.1.4:

  • NotchNest Live Activity now includes action buttons.
  • NotchNest now supports Apple Music on macOS 26.3, and we’ve updated the app to enable this integration.
  • Fixed an issue where calendar events were not syncing with NotchNest.

    • Your support means a lot, and early feedback helps us improve faster.

    As always, if you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out at 29satnam@gmail.com.

    ]]>

item.title: Version 1.1.3 - Thanks for downloading NotchNest.
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest.

Here’s what’s new in Version 1.1.3:

  • Fixed an issue where the Settings button was disabled.
  • We fixed a bug that we hope you never encountered.
  • The Game tab can now be hidden.
  • Clipboard copies now appear in Sneak.

    • Your support means a lot, and early feedback helps us improve faster.

    As always, if you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out at 29satnam@gmail.com.

    ]]>

item.title: Version 1.1.2 - Thanks for downloading NotchNest.
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest.

Here’s what’s new in Version 1.1.2:

  • Big performance boost! The app is now lighter, faster, and far more efficient with memory and CPU.
  • Resolved a Calendar-related app crash introduced in the previous update.

    • Your support means a lot, and early feedback helps us improve faster.

    As always, if you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out at 29satnam@gmail.com.

    ]]>

item.title: Version 1.1.1 - Thanks for downloading NotchNest.
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest.

Here’s what’s new in Version 1.1.1:

  • Fixed an issue where enabling Glass Mode prevented the app from accessing the file tray.
  • Resolved a crash caused by image buildup in the pasteboard; the app now supports text-only pasteboard content.
  • Implemented an attempted fix for an issue where Sleep Mode could cause the app to become a zombie process.
  • Fixed Clear Glass UI interfering with drag detection, which broke file tray interaction.
  • Added German and Chinese localization.

    • Your support means a lot, and early feedback helps us improve faster.

    As always, if you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out at 29satnam@gmail.com.

    ]]>

item.title: Version 1.1.0 - Thanks for downloading NotchNest.
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest.

Here’s what’s new in Version 1.1.0:

  • New Clipboard Manager – Access your clipboard history directly from the notch, with options to highlight, search, and pin important items for quick reuse.
  • Performance improvements and UI refinements for a smoother notch experience.

    • Your support means a lot, and early feedback helps us improve faster.

    As always, if you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out at 29satnam@gmail.com.

    ]]>

item.title: Version 1.0.11
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest.

Here's what's new in Version 1.0.11:

  • Fixed an issue where the previous update was accidentally released with placeholder album art.

    • Your support means a lot, and early feedback helps us improve faster.

    As always, if you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out at 29satnam@gmail.com.

item.title: Version 1.0.10
item.description:
Thanks for downloading NotchNest.

Here's what's new in Version 1.0.10:

  • Improved screen detection for greater accuracy.
  • Added support for Liquid Glass user interface.
  • Fixed an issue where the 'Settings' button was unresponsive.

    • Your support means a lot, and early feedback helps us improve faster.

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Welcome to NotchNest!

Initial release of NotchNest with the following features:

  • Calendar Integration
  • Quick Notes & Capture
  • Built-in Pomodoro Timer
  • Instant Bookmarks Access
  • Spotify & Music App Control
  • Instant Camera Mirror

    • Thank you for downloading NotchNest!
